<!-- GENERATED by bin/build-adapters from plugins/drupal-dkan-ai — do not edit; re-run the script -->

Reference and decision support for writing custom Drupal modules that extend DKAN — metastore, datastore, harvest, search, or events. Loads when editing files under web/modules/custom/ or docroot/modules/custom/, when working with Drupal\dkan_metastore\*, Drupal\dkan_datastore\*, Drupal\dkan_harvest\*, or Drupal\dkan_common\* namespaces, or when consuming DKAN's REST API. Targets DKAN 4.x on Drupal 10.2+ / 11. Curates the bundled `reference/dkan-*.md` doc set; does not duplicate it.

Before writing or modifying code here, read the canonical guide and its detail docs:

- Guide: `plugins/drupal-dkan-ai/skills/dkan-module-author/SKILL.md`
- `plugins/drupal-dkan-ai/skills/dkan-module-author/reference/dkan-api.md`
- `plugins/drupal-dkan-ai/skills/dkan-module-author/reference/dkan-diagnostics.md`
- `plugins/drupal-dkan-ai/skills/dkan-module-author/reference/dkan-drush.md`
- `plugins/drupal-dkan-ai/skills/dkan-module-author/reference/dkan-harvest.md`
- `plugins/drupal-dkan-ai/skills/dkan-module-author/reference/dkan-overview.md`
- `plugins/drupal-dkan-ai/skills/dkan-module-author/reference/dkan-services.md`
- `plugins/drupal-dkan-ai/skills/dkan-module-author/reference/dkan-testing.md`
- `plugins/drupal-dkan-ai/skills/dkan-module-author/reference/dkan-workflows.md`
- `plugins/drupal-dkan-ai/skills/dkan-module-author/reference/drupal-patterns.md`

These docs are the single source of truth; do not restate their contents here.
